name: OpenClaw A2A Plugin (local/dev)
description: OpenClaw-facing A2A broker adapter for delegated task lifecycle operations in local or development deployments.

operations.push: broker terminal outbox -> operator notification adapter

securitySchemes.name: Authorization
securitySchemes.description: Bearer token or gateway-authenticated session supplied by the local OpenClaw deployment. Secret values are never included in the card.

skills.name: Task delegation
skills.description: Create a broker-backed delegated task from an OpenClaw gateway request.

skills.name: Status lookup
skills.description: Project broker task state back into OpenClaw-compatible status and monitoring fields.

skills.name: Cancellation
skills.description: Cancel a broker task through the plugin boundary with actor and reason shaping.

skills.name: GitHub evidence projection
skills.description: Expose sanitized merge-gate and artifact-link evidence without raw API responses or tokens.

limitations: Alpha discovery profile; exact A2A 1.0 field names may change before stable release.
Production agent-card exposure is opt-in and must be configured by the operator.
The plugin does not own broker process management, Docker Compose, systemd, or worker execution.
Operator events and push notifications require explicit configuration and may be unavailable in minimal deployments.
